mapper.select:
select sllm.sys_id , sllm.user_id , su.user_nm , sllm.ip_address , sllm.login_datetime , sllm.logout_datetime from sys_login_log_master sllm left join sys_user su on su.user_id = sllm.user_id where 1=1
and ( sllm.user_id like concat('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') or su.user_nm like concat('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') or sllm.ip_address like concat('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') )
and sllm.login_datetime between #{startDate} and #{endDate} order by sllm.login_datetime desc
select menu_cd , menu_open_datetime , menu_close_datetime from sys_login_log_detail slld where 1=1 and link_sys_id = #{sysId} order by menu_open_datetime asc
